rationale.R1.3: The output does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure. It only reports accuracy on standard test sets, but it does not show that DomainShift-Reg improves out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness.
rationale.RX.1: All output is presented as equally confident without disclosing uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it does not focus on the OOD robustness of DomainShift-Reg.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content, but there is one minor regression in that the conclusion about improving OOD robustness is not supported by the experiments described.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
